```
   backend-service:
     environment:
       ...
       JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: "-javaagent:/otel-agent.jar
       -agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,server=y,suspend=n,address=*:5005"

    ports:

      - "${BACKEND_PORT}:8080"
      - "5055:5005"
```
